caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark blazer over a white t-shirt and a lanyard, stands behind a podium during a presentation. He is positioned on the left side of a large screen displaying a dark blue background with a network graphic. The screen contains white text that reads "CODE" followed by "https://github.com/axsauze/crypto-ml" and "SLIDES" followed by "http://github.com/axsauze/industrial-airflow". Below the main screen, a white banner features a green snake logo and the text "europython" and "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". The man remains in a similar pose across the sequence, slightly gesturing with his hands while looking toward the audience. The scene remains static with no significant changes in position, text, or lighting between the captured moments.
